scoring_rows.domain: Synthetic AP vendor-master payment rail controls
scoring_rows.expected_solo_failure_mechanism: Solo may accept the comforting vendor approval, same vendor ID, same rail token, and callback record as enough to proceed.
scoring_rows.visible_answer_key_basis: ESCALATE sibling has wrong action_type and wrong callback_scope. Both mismatches are visible in source fields and policy.
